title: Rep. Jamie Raskin asks oil companies about meeting with Trump
shortDescription: Rep. Jamie Raskin sent letters to nine oil companies about Trump's alleged request that the industry spend $1 billion on his campaign's behalf.

title: Kari Lake: Arizona Republican Senate candidate
shortDescription:
Former news anchor Kari Lake 
is the 2024 Republican Senate candidate from Arizona. In 2022, she lost the Arizona race for Governor.

title: Biden announces new Chinese tariffs
shortDescription: President Joe Biden announced that China would have to pay higher tariffs on products imported into the United States to protect workers from "unfair trade practices."

title: Nebraska, West Virginia and Maryland host pivotal primary elections: Updates
shortDescription: A slate of primaries in Maryland, West Virginia and Nebraska on Tuesday will set the stage for competitive November general election battles.

title: Scott, Vance, other Republicans attack Cohen and judge in Trump's trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump’s allies are coming to the former president’s defense and attacking witnesses and the judge's daughter in his hush money trial

title: Donald Trump gag order upheld on appeal in New York hush money trial
shortDescription: A New York appellate court upheld Donald Trump's gag order, which prevents him from commenting on witnesses or jurors in his hush money trial.

title: How Biden's new tariffs on China will impact you and the economy
shortDescription: President Joe Biden imposed sweeping tariff hikes on electric vehicles and other goods imported from the China. Here's how it affects you.

title: Liz Cheney rips Mike Johnson for joining Donald Trump's 'porn star' club
shortDescription: House Speaker takes heat from Liz Cheney and other anti-Trump Republicans for appearance as a surrogate for Donald Trump at his criminal trial.

title: Why the 2024 election could have 'robust' voter turnout
shortDescription: A Gallup poll shows that voter engagement is expected to be strong in November.

title: Is Michael Cohen still a lawyer? Here's how much Trump fixer makes now.
shortDescription: Michael Cohen's fall from Trump's good graces cost him his job, freedom, and a whole lot of money.

title: Kari Lake TV ad blasts Biden, Gallego over border
shortDescription: Kari Lake's new TV ad focuses on border security and seeks to tie her Democratic challenger to President Joe Biden.

title: Trump judge wants Cohen to be silent until he testifies | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Two Presidential candidates with two very different campaigns. A move to admit Palestine as a full member of the UN. It's all on The Excerpt.

title: When did Donald and Melania Trump get married?
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump married Melania in January 2005. Their son, Barron, was born in March 2006.

title: Trump hush money trial: Michael Cohen takes the stand | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Michael Cohen took the jury step-by-step through Trump's alleged efforts to buy the silence of adult film actress Stormy Daniels. More on The Excerpt.

title: Trump trial Tuesday recap: Trump's lawyers cross-examine Michael Cohen
shortDescription: A lawyer for Donald Trump tried to show that former fixer Michael Cohen wanted to trade cooperation for less prison time in the NY hush money trial.

title: How Ohio Sen. JD Vance landed on Trump shortlist for VP
shortDescription: A Cincinnati-area fundraiser on Wednesday could serve as Ohio Sen. JD Vance's audition for vice president.

title: Biden raises tariffs on Chinese electric vehicles, other goods
shortDescription: The higher tariffs, which have already drawn criticism from China, come as Biden is courting support of working-class voters in the 2024 campaign.

title: Alaska lawmakers pass bill segregating sports teams by 'sex at birth'
shortDescription: Emotions are high as Alaskan House legislators argued for more than 17 hours on what critics say is a hurtful and discriminatory bill.
